title: Pleiocardia tortuosa
intro: Pleiocardia tortuosa, also known as the twisted clavaria, is a species of edible and medicinal mushroom belonging to the family Arcadiaceae. The health benefits of Pleiocardia tortuosa include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood sugar, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. The bioactive constituents of this mushroom include polysaccharides, glycoproteins, and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to possess antioxidant, antimicrobial, and immunomodulatory activities. In traditional medicine, Pleiocardia tortuosa is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and extracts, which are commonly used to promote cardiovascular health, improve digestion, and boost the immune system.
taxonomy: Pleiocardia tortuosa is a species of saltwater clam in the family Veneridae. It is a type of bivalve mollusk that belongs to the kingdom Animalia.
